how would I use quint to formally specify things in this repository
The user is asking about how to use

"quint" to formally specify things in this repository (Keating). Let me think about what "quint" might refer to.

Quint is a formal specification language (https://quint-lang.org/). It's a modern

specification language that combines the best of TLA+ and other formal methods. It has a TypeScript-like syntax.

The user wants to know how to use

quint for formal specification in this repo. Let me check:
1. Is quint already used in this repo?
2. If not, how would one add it?

Let me search the codebase to see if there's any existing

formal specification work, and to understand the structure.

I should be honest - I don't have a complete picture of how quint would integrate here. Let me first search for any existing formal specification work,

and then provide guidance based on the actual structure.

Let me do some quick research:
- Check if there's any .qnt files

in the repo
- Check package.json for any quint-related tooling
- Look at the architecture to suggest where quint specs would fit

Then I'll give a concise, practical answer.

display.text:
{
  "name": "keating",
  "version": "1.3.0",
  "type": "module",
  "description": "A Pi-powered hyperteacher package with self-improving teaching policies, lesson maps, and animated visual teaching artifacts.",
  "keywords": [
    "pi-package",
    "hyperteacher",
    "education",
    "feynman-style",
    "teaching-agent",
    "ai-education",
    "cognitive-empowerment"
  ],
  "author": "Diogenes of Toronto",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "git+https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/keating.git"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/Diogenesoftoronto/keating/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://keating.help",
  "bin": {
    "keating": "bin/keating.js"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.19.0"
  },
  "files": [
    "bin/keating.js",
    "dist/",
    "pi/",
    "scripts/install/",
    "SYSTEM.md",
    "web/dist/",
    "web/.output/"
  ],
  "pi": {
    "extensions": [
      "./dist/src/pi"
    ],
    "skills": [
      "./pi/skills"
    ],
    "prompts": [
      "./pi/prompts"
    ]
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "bun x tsc -p tsconfig.json && bun scripts/copy-core-templates.ts && cd web && bun run build",
    "test": "bun test ./test/*.test.ts",
    "mutate": "stryker run",
    "video:intro": "bun scripts/render-keating-intro.mjs",
    "prepack": "bun run build"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@ax-llm/ax": "^19.0.43",
    "@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent": "^0.78.0",
    "@google/generative-ai": "^0.24.1",
    "@lix-js/sdk": "^0.6.0",
    "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "^1.29.0",
    "dotenv": "^17.4.0",
    "h3": "^2.0.1-rc.20",
    "ink": "^7.0.3",
    "manim-web": "^0.3.16",
    "nitro": "^3.0.260311-beta",
    "react": "^19.2.5",
    "react-syntax-highlighter": "^16.1.1",
    "zod": "^3.25.76"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@remotion/cli": "^4.0.455",
    "@remotion/media-utils": "^4.0.455",
    "@remotion/renderer": "^4.0.455",
    "@stryker-mutator/core": "^9.6.1",
    "@types/node": "^25.6.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.14",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3",
    "@types/react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.5.13",
    "fast-check": "^4.8.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.2.5",
    "remotion": "^4.0.455"
  }
}
